heading: Termination
label: 8785 Termination
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b) of amended .section 605 of Pub. L. 112–158section 605 of Pub. L. 112–158section 8551 of this title
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b) of amended .section 605 of Pub. L. 112–158section 605 of Pub. L. 112–158section 8551 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The provisions of sections 8721, 8722, 8723, 8725, 8726, 8727, and 8771 of this title, subchapter I, and subchapter III shall terminate on the date that is 30 days after the date on which the President makes the certification described in .section 8551(a) of this title
